sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93299" key="sa/rgalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σάργαλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n93299.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the place in a chariot where the whip was kept</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:116" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.116</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
